summary: Tested 3 P0 features: UDDI DDI x4 multiplier, ND Discovery<->Sizing bidirectional sync. All 3 core features WORKING. Found 1 minor UI label bug in the Why-This-Model dialog.

ui_bugs.issue: The 'DNS Objects' description label is hardcoded as 'DHCP x 3 + Static x 2' regardless of platform mode. For UDDI/NXVS sites, it should say 'DHCP x 4 + Static x 2'. The calculation itself IS correct (50.4K vs 39.2K), only the descriptive text is wrong.
ui_bugs.fix: Change line 222 to: {isUDDI ? 'DHCP x 4 + Static x 2' : 'DHCP x 3 + Static x 2'} — isUDDI is already computed at line 101 of SizingDialogs.jsx

action_items: Fix SizingDialogs.jsx line 222: change hardcoded 'DHCP x 3 + Static x 2' to conditional: isUDDI ? 'DHCP x 4 + Static x 2' : 'DHCP x 3 + Static x 2' (isUDDI is already at line 101)
critical_code_review_comments: TokenCalculatorSummary.jsx line 709: useEffect dependency array uses sites.filter(s => s.role === 'ND').length — works correctly but is a React pattern warning. Acceptable for now.

TokenCalculatorSummary.jsx line 764: ND→ni-3 sync checks site.role before update. This is correct as long as role change and numIPs change are separate updates (which they are in normal UX flow). No issue.
SizingDialogs.jsx line 222: isUDDI variable is already computed at line 101 but not used for the DNS Objects subtitle label.

uddi_x4_multiplier.dialog_label_bug: Label shows 'DHCP x 3 + Static x 2' in both modes - incorrect for UDDI

nd_sync_direction1_discovery_to_sizing.test_case: Set ni-3 to 5000 in Discovery (AI/NI tab, SNMP/SSH devices question), ND site in Sizing updated to 5000

nd_sync_direction2_sizing_to_discovery.test_case: Changed ND site IP count to 8000 in Sizing, Discovery ni-3 updated to 8000

unit_letter_n_auto_nd.note: SiteTableRow.jsx lines 499-500 auto-sets role to ND when N is selected. Verified via keyboard select in test. The N unit site (site-1772182285373-xu8cw3cxw) role changed to ND and sync was confirmed working.

seed_data_creation: Changed 'Site 8' (site-1772182285373-xu8cw3cxw) unit letter site role from DNS/DHCP to ND for testing. Customer ni-3 value changed to 5000.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer 'Customer' was used for testing. Drawing #10 was in Hybrid mode (NIOS+UDDI) during testing. The 'Site 8' with unit N (site-1772182285373-xu8cw3cxw) now has ND role and 5000 IPs due to test interactions. The ni-3 discovery answer is now 5000. ni-3 question is in Discovery > AI/NI tab > Asset/Network Insight section > 'What is the total number of SNMP/SSH devices that will be managed/interrogated?'.
